title: useWindowSize with rAF throttling and SSR-safe initial value
scenario_context: Common pattern for components needing window dimensions. SSR-safe + perf-optimized.
responsive_reasoning: 1. rAF throttle.\n2. useSyncExternalStore for SSR.\n3. Single subscription per consumer ideally.
what_breaks_naive_approach: innerWidth in render causes hydration mismatch.

title: Card grid where each card has internal container queries independent of grid
scenario_context: Grid cards. Each card adapts to its allocated width (grid cell). Cards in 1-col layout (mobile) vs 4-col (desktop) get different widths and adapt.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Grid sets cell width.\n2. Each card container-queries its cell.\n3. Independent adaptation.
edge_cases_handled: Few cards — wide each, horizontal layout
Card always optimal for its cell
what_breaks_naive_approach: Viewport queries make cards look same in different cell widths.

title: Long-form blog post with responsive image captions and figure widths
scenario_context: Article with figures (image + caption). Caption text smaller than body. Figure can span full width or constrain to prose width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Caption smaller via clamp.\n2. Figure has width variants (full-bleed, prose-width).\n3. Layout grid.
edge_cases_handled: Long caption — wraps within prose width
what_breaks_naive_approach: All figures same width loses editorial variety.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Figure variants. 2) Caption sizing. 3) Editorial flexibility.

title: Vertical rhythm: line-height + spacing aligned to baseline grid
scenario_context: Maintain baseline grid where text aligns to invisible horizontal lines. line-height + margin in multiples.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Set base line-height.\n2. All spacing in multiples.\n3. Visual rhythm.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Baseline grid. 2) Fluid baseline. 3) Visual harmony.

title: Sortable list with drag handle that's visible only when sorting (mouse) or always (touch)
scenario_context: Reorderable list. Mouse: handle on hover. Touch: handle always visible.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-005 pattern.\n2. (hover: hover) reveals on hover.\n3. Touch always visible.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Always visible on desktop = visual noise.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Pointer-aware visibility. 2) Keyboard parity. 3) Universal access.

title: Comment field with character counter that updates without scroll jump
scenario_context: Comment field shows '120/280 characters'. As user types, counter updates. Doesn't cause layout shift.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Counter reserved space (min-height).\n2. Updates in place.\n3. Visual indicator near limit.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Hiding counter when not needed causes CLS when appearing.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Reserved space. 2) Live announcements. 3) Visual states.

title: Sticky CTA that always respects safe area + keyboard simultaneously
scenario_context: Sticky CTA button at bottom of form. Must clear: home indicator + keyboard when summoned.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Either safe area or keyboard, not both
responsive_reasoning: 1. CSS calc combines.\n2. var(--keyboard-inset) + env(safe-area-inset-bottom).\n3. Transform for keyboard.

detection_strategy.code_pattern: padding-bottom: max(0.75rem, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); transform: translateY(calc(-1 * var(--keyboard-inset, 0px)));

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Tap fields → CTA above keyboard. Submit visible.

title: Tablet split-view detection (less than 50% of screen)
scenario_context: Detect when iPad app is in split-view mode (window width less than half of physical screen).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Window width vs screen.width.\n2. Ratio less than 0.5 = split-view.\n3. Behavior adapts.

title: iPad cursor support: hover-like behavior with trackpad-only
scenario_context: iPad with trackpad shows cursor. Hover-like behaviors should work. Buttons can show subtle hover states.
responsive_reasoning: 1. (hover: hover) detects trackpad.\n2. Hover styles active.\n3. Per responsive-085 pattern.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Hover without media query sticks on touch.

title: Two-column form: labels left, fields right on wide; stacked on narrow
scenario_context: Settings form. Wide: label column + field column. Narrow: stacked label-then-field.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container queries for arrangement.\n2. CSS Grid template areas.\n3. Label/field associated semantically.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Forced two-col narrow has labels in 100px column unreadable.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Container-aware. 2) Two clear layouts. 3) Semantic labels.

title: Filter chips above table that wrap responsively
scenario_context: Active filters shown as chips above table. Wrap naturally; clear-all button at end.
responsive_reasoning: 1. flex-wrap.\n2. Each chip with X for remove.\n3. Clear all at end.
accessibility_across_viewports: aria-label on remove. Delete key keyboard shortcut.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Flex wrap. 2) Keyboard support. 3) Clear all.

title: Sign-up form with social login buttons that adapt layout
scenario_context: Sign-up with Google, Apple, GitHub buttons plus email/password form. Layout adapts.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Wide: row of social buttons.\n2. Narrow: stacked.\n3. Email form below.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Container-aware. 2) Universal flow. 3) Multiple auth methods.

title: Video thumbnail with hover preview (auto-play on hover desktop)
scenario_context: Video thumbnails on grid. Hover desktop: muted preview plays. Touch: no preview (just thumbnail).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Hover-only feature.\n2. Muted autoplay on hover.\n3. Stop on mouseleave.
performance_notes: preload=metadata light. Plays only on hover.
accessibility_across_viewports: Static thumbnail with alt always available.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Hover-only preview. 2) Touch unaffected. 3) Keyboard parity.

title: Mega menu with categories, links, and featured content adapts to mobile drawer
scenario_context: Mega menu with categories, sub-links, featured products. Desktop: hover panel. Mobile: collapsible drawer sections.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Mega menu desktop convention.\n2. Mobile uses accordion drawer.\n3. Same data.

layout_strategy.information_density_changes: Mobile shows one at a time

edge_cases_handled: Featured content in mega — not shown on mobile (acceptable)
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Mobile accordion. 2) Desktop mega. 3) Same data.

title: Multi-step confirmation: each step is a separate dialog or sheet
scenario_context: Critical action (delete account) requires multiple confirmations. Each step is a dialog/sheet.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Each step has clear focus.\n2. Adaptive per viewport.\n3. Cancel anywhere.

title: Offline-first PWA with service worker for critical assets
scenario_context: PWA works offline. Service worker caches HTML/CSS/JS so app loads. Show offline indicator.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Service worker caches.\n2. Show offline state.\n3. Pending writes queued.
what_breaks_naive_approach: No offline = app dead on bad network.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Service worker. 2) Online detection. 3) User feedback.

title: Hook for detecting if element is sticky-pinned (scrolled into sticky state)
scenario_context: Element with position: sticky changes appearance when 'stuck'. IntersectionObserver detects.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Sentinel element above sticky.\n2. IO detects sentinel leaving viewport.\n3. Sticky state derived.
edge_cases_handled: Element scrolls into sticky — shadow added

title: Notification list item with image, title, body, time, action that adapts container
scenario_context: Notification list. In wide context: all parts inline. In narrow: stacks.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container query.\n2. Same data; layout adapts.\n3. Progressive elements.

title: Inline code styling that scales with surrounding text fluidly
scenario_context: Inline `code` in prose. Should be slightly smaller than text, monospace, with background. Scales with text.
responsive_reasoning: 1. em-based size.\n2. Monospace family.\n3. Background distinguish.
edge_cases_handled: Code in heading — scales with heading
Code in body — scales with body

title: Floating label input that animates label position on focus/value
scenario_context: Floating label input. Empty + unfocused: label inside. Focused or has value: label floats above.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Label position via CSS transition.\n2. :placeholder-shown pseudo.\n3. Reserved space for floated label.
accessibility_across_viewports: Real label + input. peer/peer-placeholder-shown is Tailwind for general sibling selector.

title: Hover and tap states unified with click handler + appropriate feedback
scenario_context: Buttons need: hover (mouse), active press (touch + mouse), focus (keyboard). Each input gets appropriate feedback.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Three pseudo-classes for three states.\n2. focus-visible for keyboard only.\n3. Universal pattern.

title: Email field with autocomplete + email keyboard on mobile
scenario_context: Email input. Mobile shows @ on keyboard. autoComplete enables fill.
responsive_reasoning: 1. type='email' triggers @ key.\n2. inputMode='email' redundant but ensures.\n3. autoComplete='email'.

title: Notification toast position aware of bottom nav presence
scenario_context: Toast positioned at bottom. Must clear bottom nav + safe area.
responsive_reasoning: 1. CSS var for nav height.\n2. Stacking with env.\n3. Universal pattern.
solution: // See responsive-157 for the StackedSnackbar pattern.

title: Onboarding slides that respect orientation (portrait phone landscape)
scenario_context: Onboarding has illustration + text + Next button. Landscape phone has limited vertical — different arrangement.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Portrait stacks.\n2. Landscape side-by-side.\n3. Same flow.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Orientation drives. 2) Same content. 3) Optimal use of space.

title: iPad with detached keyboard handling shortcuts and shortcuts hint
scenario_context: iPad detects keyboard via any-pointer. Shortcuts active and visible when keyboard attached. Hidden when detached.
responsive_reasoning: 1. any-pointer:fine signals keyboard.\n2. Conditional shortcut hints.\n3. Per responsive-115.
solution: // See responsive-115. Same pattern applies.

title: Inbox + reply pane: replying expands a pane within or modal on mobile
scenario_context: Email inbox. Reply expands inline pane (desktop) or opens modal (mobile).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Desktop: expandable reply pane.\n2. Mobile: modal full-screen.\n3. Same data.
solution: // Combines responsive-116 inbox pattern + reply mode\n// Mobile reply triggers modal; desktop expands a pane below thread.
accessibility_across_viewports: Reply is form. Focus moves to compose.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Modal vs inline. 2) Same compose form. 3) Universal.

title: Column visibility toggle: hide columns user doesn't need
scenario_context: Settings panel lets user choose visible columns. Hidden columns persist.
responsive_reasoning: 1. User customization respected.\n2. localStorage persists.\n3. Same data; user picks visible.

title: Radio button group with adaptive layout: stack mobile, inline desktop
scenario_context: Yes/No/Maybe radios. Mobile: stack. Desktop: inline.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container queries.\n2. Real radio inputs.\n3. 44pt min target.

title: Image with placeholder color from dominant color extraction
scenario_context: Image with dominant color background as placeholder during load. Better than gray.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Extract dominant color server-side.\n2. Set as background-color.\n3. Image fades in.
performance_notes: Color is just a CSS value.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Dominant color. 2) No CLS. 3) Smooth UX.

title: Footer with link columns that collapse to accordion on mobile
scenario_context: Footer with 4 columns of links. Mobile: each column becomes accordion.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Columns at wide, accordion at narrow.\n2. Container queries.\n3. Same data.
